series_metadata.series_title: AUDIT UNIT CHANGE AND UPDATE FORM
series_metadata.series_description: This form (aud-8138) is used when a local government entity changes their name, combines with another entity, is disolved or created. It documents the change, deletion or addition and lists the audit period when the change took place.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, Electronic: Delete
